name.description: A brief title describing the competition. Use task-oriented titles (e.g. 'Predict Stock Returns') as opposed to titles like 'Company X Stock Return Competition'.

url.description: Link to the competition. Feel free to insert codes so you can track the source, or add '?ref=mlcontests'.

deadline.description: Final day for submissions. Format is 'D MMM YYYY'.

registration-deadline.description: Final day for registration. Format is 'D MMM YYYY'.

launched.description: First day of the competition. Format is 'D MMM YYYY'.

added.description: Day on which the competition was added to the ML Contests site. Format is 'D MMM YYYY'.

prize.description: Total available prize pool. Unconditional cash or liquid cryptocurrencty prizes only, converted to USD.

platform.description: Which platform is hosting the competition? E.g. 'Kaggle'/'DrivenData'/'Codabench'/'Independent'.

sponsor.description: List any organisations sponsoring the competition.

conference-year.description: If the competition is affiliated with a conference, enter the year of the conference here.

additional_urls.description: Any additional relevant links to competition information hosted elsewhere
